_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: HK Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. Pending labels still require project-owner approval before promotion-ready status.

This is not legal advice, external counsel review, or procurement-grade legal approval; candidate labels remain separate from locked recall baselines.
_stage_b_approval.scope: HK Stage B candidate labels only; no recall-lock promotion.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: HK Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after HK Stage B precision guards

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: with minimisation and pseudonymisation where feasible
Cross-border storage may occur in encrypted cloud services in Hong Kong and Singapore
Data subjects may submit access or correction requests
name, role, contact, access date, and reason

For a contemplated acquisition of SolarMoor Capital SPC and a confidential virtual asset custody pilot at our subsidiary Nimbus Vault Limited, access is limited to wall-crossed staff recorded on an insider list maintained by Mr. Kelvin Yip, Company Secretary.

Such MNPI includes draft commercial terms for a green-linked loan margin grid and non-public cybersecurity remediation costs from a recent ransomware incident affecting our Harborcrest data hub, and disclosure prior to announcement is prohibited.

Cross-border storage may occur in encrypted cloud services in Hong Kong and Singapore subject to transfer impact assessment aligned with local guidance and contractual safeguards; retention is 7 years after transaction or employment end unless legal hold applies.

must_detect.matched_text: For a contemplated acquisition of SolarMoor Capital SPC and a confidential virtual asset custody pilot at our subsidiary Nimbus Vault Limited, access is limited to wall-crossed staff recorded on an insider list maintained by Mr. Kelvin Yip, Company Secretary.

Such MNPI includes draft commercial terms for a green-linked loan margin grid and non-public cybersecurity remediation costs from a recent ransomware incident affecting our Harborcrest data hub, and disclosure prior to announcement is prohibited.

Cross-border storage may occur in encrypted cloud services in Hong Kong and Singapore subject to transfer impact assessment aligned with local guidance and contractual safeguards; retention is 7 years after transaction or employment end unless legal hold applies.

must_not_detect.reason: Educational/marketing reference without any actual wallet address or MNPI value.
General educational reference; not itself MNPI or PII.

uncertain.matched_text: retention is 7 years after transaction or employment end unless legal hold applies
uncertain.reason: Data retention period is privacy-relevant under PDPO but there is no explicit retention rule in the allowed list.
Market-sensitive control reference that may indicate potential MNPI handling, but no direct rule provided.
Privacy transfer impact assessments are PDPO-relevant but not covered by an explicit allowed marker rule.
